ddls:
CREATE TABLE "browser_market_share" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the year (e.g., January, February, etc.) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the data (e.g., North America, Europe, Asia) */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Device type (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "total_market_share" REAL /* Total market share for all browsers combined */,
  "chrome" REAL /* Market share of Chrome browser */,
  "ie" REAL /* Market share of Internet Explorer browser */,
  "firefox" REAL /* Market share of Firefox browser */,
  "safari" REAL /* Market share of Safari browser */,
  "opera" REAL /* Market share of Opera browser */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the market share data (e.g., internal survey, external API) */,
  "data_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "browsers" (
  "browser_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each browser */,
  "browser_name" TEXT /* Name of the browser */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the browser */,
  "vendor" TEXT /* Vendor of the browser */,
  "first_release_date" TEXT /* Date when the browser was first released */,
  "latest_version" TEXT /* Latest version of the browser */,
  "platforms" TEXT /* Platforms the browser supports (e.g., Windows, macOS, Linux, iOS, Android) */,
  "features" TEXT /* Key features of the browser (e.g., privacy settings, extensions, speed) */,
  "market_position" TEXT /* Brief description of the browser's market position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("browser_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, administrator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON array of permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was last updated */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data used in the report */,
  "data" TEXT /* JSON data of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("username")
)
column_names: Month of the year (e.g., January, February, etc.)
